---
title: "IS428 <insert title>"
---

# Welcome to our Visual Analytics Project

Welcome! We are a group of students from **Singapore Management University (SMU)** currently enrolled in **IS428: Visual Analytics for Business Intelligence**.  


## Introduction
Our team is dedicated to transforming raw data into insights through interactive visualization.
This website serves as the official documentation for our project under **IS428 Visual Analytics for Business Intelligence**.

## Project Deliverables
Throughout this semester, we will update this site with:
* **Interactive Dashboards:** Exploring crime distributions across geography and demographics.
* **Trend Analysis:** Identifying seasonal and long-term shifts in various offense categories.
* **Methodology & Documentation:** Comprehensive records of our data wrangling and visualization design choices.

## Team Members
* **Choo Yi Ning** – School of Computing and Information Systems (SCIS)
* **Saanvi Madan** – School of Economics (SOE)

---
